item.text:
What is the name of your vessel and |callsign*registration number*nickname|?

The name of my vessel is “Queen Ingrid” |CALLSIGN DELTA QUEBEC VICTOR OSCAR*registration number DQVO*nickname DQVO|.

Please |spell*state*say| your vessel’s name.
What is your present |course*way*route| and |speed*velocity*swift|?

My present |course*route*course| is |zero nine seven degrees*“o”, ninety-seven degrees*“o” nineteen – seven degrees|.
My speed is 36 |knots*miles per hour*kilometres per hour|.

From what direction are you |approaching*coming*sailing|?
